heroHeadline: Ukraine and Syria Agree to Cooperate on Security and Exchange Military Experience
heroSubtitle: Zelenskyy announces security partnership with Syria as Kyiv strikes Russian oil refineries and Ukraine's First Lady facilitates fourth child reunification exchange
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
